creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
I was not able to reproduce on a 15-CURRENT host, tho, I was sure I was experiencing the same thing a few years ago.

I am currently moving my aging systems from UFS+SU+SUJ to UFS+gjournal because I recall no data loss with gjournal (from previous usage many years ago), and SU+SUJ continues to lose data, on my workstation at least. I was hoping to see an write improvement on the GEOM raid (mirrors and stripe) on my NAS, tho I cannot recall what the writes were like prior to switching to gjournal.

I use a SSD on one AHCI bus for the journal, and the data is a GEOM raid is across 4 separate HBAs, each connected to their own SAS expander:

> $ gjournal status
>                       Name  Status  Components
> stripe/graid10.eli.journal     N/A  stripe/graid10.eli
>                                     ada1.nop
